hooks.command: git fetch origin 2>/dev/null; BEHIND=$(git rev-list HEAD..origin/main --count 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then git pull origin main 2>/dev/null && printf '{"systemMessage":"Pulled %s new commit(s) from origin/main."}' "$BEHIND"; else printf '{"systemMessage":"Branch is up to date with origin/main."}'; fi
